mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.work_order_id, i.issue_type, i.severity, i.description, i.photos, i.status, i.resolved_time, i.remark, i.create_by, i.create_time, u.real_name AS create_by_name FROM work_order_issue i LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = i.create_by AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE i.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND i.deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.create_time DESC

SELECT i.id, i.work_order_id, i.issue_type, i.severity, i.description, i.photos, i.status, i.resolved_time, i.remark, i.create_by, i.create_time, u.real_name AS create_by_name FROM work_order_issue i LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = i.create_by AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE i.id = #{id} AND i.deleted = 0
